calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support There Of; And Proposed Ordered
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Jefferson Capital Systems, LLC's motion to vacate default and default judgment and to dismiss this case is granted in its entirety. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The default and default judgment that were entered on June 5, 2020 are now vacated and the case is now dismissed.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Moiton To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC Moiton To Vacate Default And Default Judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. The matter is ordered off calendar due to the moving party's failure to comply with SFLR 2.7(B) (courtesy copies).

Judge: Barbara Zuniga. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/BZ)
